The '''DF.9 laser cannon''' was a [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] produced by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]. Versions of the weapon were included in the company's [[DF.9/Legends|DF.9]] anti-[[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] battery, the [[Twin DF.9/Legends|Twin DF.9]], the [[SP.9 Anti-Infantry Artillery Vehicle]],<ref name="EGWT" /> the [[Twin SP.9]],<ref name="RASB2">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]</ref> and the [[DF.9/B]].<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> The DF.9 was also used on [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]' [[XR-85 tank droid]].<ref name="DESB">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>
